mapper.sql: item_id, item_type, publish_type, title, description, features, images, image_list, location, event_time, publisher_id, publisher_name, contact, storage_location, status, view_count, collect_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (item_type, publish_type, title, description, features, images, image_list, location, event_time, publisher_id, publisher_name, contact, storage_location, status) VALUES (#{itemType}, #{publishType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{features}, #{images}, #{imageList}, #{location}, #{eventTime}, #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{contact}, #{storageLocation}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
UPDATE items SET collect_count = collect_count + 1 WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
UPDATE items SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
